result: The BMI variables for ages 25 and 32 have been cleaned and harmonised according to the specifications. The input files were loaded from `data/input/`, merged by `NSID`, and BMI values were mapped to standard missing codes (-9, -8, -1, -3, -2). Valid continuous BMI values were preserved, and NA values were recoded to -3. The final dataset containing only `NSID`, `bmi25`, and `bmi32` was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
